CustomField.description: Set to true at the start of ScanResultFileQueueable.execute(), before any DML, so it is committed outside the savepoint scope. Allows the LWC to distinguish a serializer failure (traversal completed but saving failed) from a mid-traversal engine failure - both result in Status = Failed with no Result_File_Id__c, but only the serializer path has this flag set. When true and Result_File_Id__c is null, the LWC shows the "Download Partial Results" option. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Result Save Attempted
